'''Kailio Entertainments''' was a business set up and owned by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] to serve as a legitimate front for their manufacture and distribution of [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] entertainment in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. On the surface, Kailio Entertainments was seen as an upstanding and respected company, and was known as a charitable patron of the arts. Activities such as the company's input in artistic relief efforts helped Kailio project a Humanitarian image, hiding its seedy background and trillion-[[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]]-a-year laundering operations.
